channel.title: GDACS RSS information
channel.description: Near real-time notification about natural disaster with a potential humanitarian impact

item.title: Green flood alert in Türkiye
item.description: On 28/06/2026, a flood started in Türkiye, lasting until 30/06/2026 (last update). The flood caused 0 deaths and 0 displaced .
item.dc:subject: FL1

gdacs:resource.gdacs:title: Event in rss format
gdacs:resource.gdacs:description: Joint Research Center of the European Commission
gdacs:resource.gdacs:acknowledgements: Copyright notice: European Union (CC BY 4.0), reuse is allowed, provided appropriate credit to GDACS is given.

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.2M, Depth:9.906km) in Talaud Islands, Indonesia 29/06/2026 04:23 UTC, 20 thousand in 100km.
item.description: On 6/29/2026 4:23:05 AM, an earthquake occurred in Talaud Islands, Indonesia potentially affecting 20 thousand in 100km. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.2M, Depth:9.906km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1

item.dc:subject: EQ1

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.3M, Depth:13.6km) in United States 29/06/2026 03:32 UTC, 310 thousand in MMI>=III.
item.description: On 6/29/2026 3:32:39 AM, an earthquake occurred in United States potentially affecting 310 thousand in MMI>=III. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.3M, Depth:13.6km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 4.9M, Depth:10km) in Kermadec Islands Region 29/06/2026 03:10 UTC, No people affected in 100km.
item.description: On 6/29/2026 3:10:28 AM, an earthquake occurred in Kermadec Islands Region potentially affecting No people affected in 100km. The earthquake had Magnitude 4.9M, Depth:10km.

item.title: Green forest fire notification in Russian Federation
item.description: On 23/06/2026, a forest fire started in Russian Federation, until 28/06/2026.
item.dc:subject: WF1
item.gdacs:severity: Green impact for forestfire in 6744 ha
